title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud video on building AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit and Looker, grounded in enterprise data. Covers Model Context Protocol, MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml configuration, and implementation through a Python environment with a local web interface.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through configuring an AI agent with the Agent Development Kit and Looker, grounding the agent in enterprise data through the Model Context Protocol. It covers the MCP Toolbox for Databases and the tools.yaml configuration that defines available tools, then implements the setup in a Python environment with a local web interface. The takeaway is a concrete first configuration that connects an agent to Looker via MCP for enterprise operations and API integration.
